projects.title: Pharmacy POS
projects.subtitle: Flutter, Firebase, SQLite, Docker
projects.description: A POS system for pharmacies with 100% offline functionality and cloud sync.
details: Full offline functionality with cloud sync
Conflict resolution for unsynced sales and stock
Multi-tab support for up to 10 simultaneous customers
Tested in Docker containers for cross-platform reliability

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.subtitle: Angular, Node.js, MongoDB
projects.description: A secure e-commerce website with product search, cart management, and an admin dashboard.
details: JWT authentication and role-based access control
Admin dashboard with full CRUD on users and products
API optimized for 1000+ simulated concurrent users
Angular route guards and backend validation
Password hashing and secure profile management

projects.title: Budgeting App Cero
projects.subtitle: Java, SQLite, JavaFX
projects.description: A personal finance management app built in a team of 3.
details: GUI designed with JavaFX for clear navigation
Summary tab, Reminders, and Income Sources features
Visual summaries with persistent SQLite storage

projects.title: Gama Glam
projects.subtitle: C++, Qt — Image Editor
projects.description: A lightweight desktop image editor built in a team of 3.
